global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with food images and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery services with a focus on freshness.

elements.label: orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background that fills the entire banner.

elements.label: three product images
elements.description: Three rectangular images representing food items, arranged horizontally in the center.

elements.label: left circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located to the left of the product images.

elements.label: right circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located to the right of the product images.

elements.label: middle circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon positioned between the left and right circular icons.

elements.label: text description
elements.description: Text that reads 'Your cravings, delivered Fresh favorites nearby' in a bold, white font.

elements.label: call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button at the bottom with the text 'Shop now' in white.

elements.label: advertiser name
elements.description: Text that reads 'FreshDash' in a prominent, bold font at the top of the banner.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: shop now button
elements.description: A button at the bottom of the banner with the text 'Shop now' in a clear, inviting font.
